item.title: LiveFPLnet: LiveFPL @LiveFPLnet · 38min The exact 4 mentioned in the tweet fell. Welbeck waits (tomorrow probably) Cita LiveFPL @Liv

Welbeck. Maybe: Van Hecke
Rice + Keane + Gavrdiol + Abraham 8 2 mil

item.title: FPLStatus: FPL Status @FPLStatus · 40min Automatizado por @Albo3li Price Fallers! (4) #FPL Rice #ARS £7.2m Abraham #AVL £5.8m K

item.title: City_Xtra: City Xtra @City_Xtra · 1h #ManCity are ‘getting closer’ to signing Palmeiras winger, Eduardo Conceição and want to reach
item.description:
City Xtra @City_Xtra · 1h #ManCity are ‘getting closer’ to signing Palmeiras winger, Eduardo Conceição and want to reach an agreement ‘as soon as possible’ worth close to €40M for the 16-year-old. Source linked to Conceição: "All the greats in Europe want him."
[via @felipee_sil ] 18 35 563 17 mil

item.title: City_Xtra: City Xtra @City_Xtra · 2h Antoine Semenyo has shared disgusting racist abuse aimed at him on Instagram. 99 173 2 mil 109
